zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Danvers於大約1450年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯時，她的父親Richard Danvers42歲，母親Elizabeth Euphemia Langston19歲。她與William Dale結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1533年10月21日享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏迪德馬緒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Danvers于大约1450年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯时，她的父亲Richard Danvers42岁，母亲Elizabeth Euphemia Langston19岁。她与William Dale结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1533年10月21日享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏迪德馬緒。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Danvers was born about 1450, in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard Danvers, was 42 and her mother, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, was 19. She married William Dale. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 21 October 1533, at the age of 84, and was buried in Tidmarsh, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Danvers est née environ 1450, à Culworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Danvers, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Dale. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 octobre 1533, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Tidmarsh, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Danvers um 1450 in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Danvers 42 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Euphemia Langston 19. Sie hat William Dale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 21. Oktober 1533 im Alter von 84 Jahren und wurde in Tidmarsh, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Danvers è nata il circa 1450 nel Culworth, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Richard Danvers, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William Dale. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 ottobre 1533, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Tidmarsh, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Danversが約1450年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクウルウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard Danversは42歳，母Elizabeth Euphemia Langstonは19歳であった。William Daleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1533年10月21日に84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアティドマーッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Danvers(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 노르섬프토실르 컬워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Danvers(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Euphemia Langston(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 William Dale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 10월 21일 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 티드마시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Danvers nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Danvers, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William Dale. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1533, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Tidmarsh, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Danvers родилась около 1450 г. в местности кулворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Danvers было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Dale. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 21 октября 1533 г. в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности тидмарш, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Danvers nació aproximadamente 1450, en Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Danvers, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William Dale. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1533, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Tidmarsh, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
